title: Brand Specialist – Italy
description:
**Rome, Latium, Italy (Hybrid role: 3 days office, 2 days home per week)**


**About the Company**


Pharmanovia is a fast\-growing global speciality pharmaceutical company with a portfolio of over 20 brands across more than 160 markets. Our mission is to improve patient health globally by revitalising niche, trusted medicines across our core therapeutic areas: Cardiovascular, Oncology, Endocrinology and Neurology. With over 300 employees across 29 nationalities and offices in Europe, the Middle East, Asia, and Australia, we are committed to quality, innovation, and the responsible management of the lifecycle of established medicines.


**About the Role**


As a Brand Specialist supporting product launches in Southern Europe, you will focus on Italy and Spain, working closely with internal teams to foster a collaborative environment and ensure successful launches.


**Responsibilities**


**Product Launch Support:**


* Act as the primary regional marketing lead for Italy and Spain, aligning global strategy with local market needs.
* Plan and execute global product launches, contributing market insights and competitive intelligence to inform brand strategy.
* Coordinate launch readiness activities to meet timelines and deliverables.
* Represent local market needs in regional meetings.
* Execute the tactical delivery, localisation, and execution of global brand plans across all channels.


**Promotional Materials and Programs:**


* Adapt and localise promotional materials in line with global guidelines.
* Develop local brand plans and support key tactical initiatives (e.g., sales tools, digital programs, events).
* Validate key product messages for effective localisation.
* Manage the asset approvals and compliance process in line with regulatory requirements (e.g., AIFA/EFPIA guidance).
* Collaborate with external agencies to develop and print materials.


**Sales Force Excellence:**


* Collaborate with General Managers and Commercial teams to implement local marketing strategies.
* Develop training tools and assist with training presentations.
* Ensure field teams are effectively equipped and serve as the primary point of contact for feedback and material requests.
* Monitor material performance and share insights to support optimised execution.


**Cross\-Functional Collaboration:**


* Work closely with global marketing, medical affairs, market access, and regional commercial teams on a range of marketing projects.
* Maintain high\-level disease knowledge and credibility with physicians.
* Attend local congresses and support KOL interactions in collaboration with Medical Affairs.
* Communicate updates to Global Marketing and share best practices with other brand managers.


**Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field (e.g., life sciences, business, marketing); advanced degree preferred.
* Minimum 3 years of experience in commercial functions, with 1\-3 years in an EU operational marketing role.
* Proven competence in various marketing activities, including traditional and digital.
* Experience in submitting compliant promotional materials to AIFA.
* Basic understanding of medical aspects in the therapeutic area, with a willingness to gain in\-depth expertise.
* Professional level in English (oral and written).
* Professional level in Italian and/or Spanish
* We would welcome anyone based in Italy, Spain, or the UK.
* Excellent user of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).


**Why Join Us?**


At Pharmanovia, you will join a global speciality pharma company that values quality and offers clear career paths, training, and international mobility to support your professional growth.


**Equal Opportunity Statement**


Pharmanovia is an equal\-opportunity employer. Pharmanovia does not unlawfully discriminate against employees or applicants for employment based on an individual’s race, colour, religion, creed, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, genetic information, age, disability, marital status or any other status protected by applicable law. This policy applies to all terms, conditions, and privileges of employment, including recruitment, hiring, placement, compensation, promotion, discipline, and termination. Pharmanovia will make reasonable accommodation for qualified individuals with known disabilities, in accordance with applicable law.

title: R&D Deployment Senior Scientist, Translational Science & Claims Excellence
description:
Kenvue is currently recruiting for a:


R\&D Deployment Senior Scientist, Translational Science \& Claims Excellence**What we do**


At Kenvue, we realize the extraordinary power of everyday care. Built on over a century of heritage and rooted in science, we’re the house of iconic brands \- including NEUTROGENA®, AVEENO®, TYLENOL®, LISTERINE®, JOHNSON’S® and BAND\-AID® that you already know and love. Science is our passion; care is our talent.

**Who We Are**


Our global team is \~ 22,000 brilliant people with a workplace culture where every voice matters, and every contribution is appreciated. We are passionate about insights, innovation and committed to delivering the best products to our customers. With expertise and empathy, being a Kenvuer means having the power to impact millions of people every day. We put people first, care fiercely, earn trust with science and solve with courage – and have brilliant opportunities waiting for you! Join us in shaping our future–and yours.

**Role reports to:**


EMEA Translational Science RD Director**Location:**


Europe/Middle East/Africa, Italy, Lazio, Rome**Work Location:**


Hybrid**What you will do**


Kenvue is currently recruiting for:

**R\&D Deployment Senior Scientist, Translational Science \& Claims Excellence**


This position is based in Pomezia Santa Palomba (Rome).

**What you will do**

**Key Responsibilities:**


Serve as a member of the EMEA Translational Science Claims Excellence team dedicated to the deployment of the claim’s strategy and execution of claim roadmaps and creative claims support strategies for new product or projects, supporting cross\-functionally across R\&D subject matter experts (consumer science, product design, medical affairs, regulatory affairs and others).

* Play a claims subject matter role in understanding the relevant science to provide support and translations to strengthen claims and or science storytelling to cross\-functional and project teams.
* Communicate and translate scientific and technical knowledge for consumer\-facing and healthcare professional message deployment.
* Deploy strategies, study synopsis, and partner with clinical operations for execution of clinical studies to substantiate claims.
* Participate on regional, cross functional teams for execution of new product ideas and project implementation, providing support and ensuring timeline adherence and project completion of claims approvals and corresponding studies.
* Champion the Kenvue Human Centered Innovation mindset, claims process and claims system.

*This position requires travel up to 10%.*

**What We’re Looking For:**

**Required Qualifications:**

* Education: Bachelor's degree with at least 3 years or Master’s/PhD degree with 2\+ years of Consumer/Skin Health (or equivalent) industry and/or relevant work experience. Education to include scientific fields such as health sciences, biology, chemistry, engineering, sensory, or cosmetic science is preferred.
* Experience in developing compelling claims \& communication strategies and translating scientific evidence into robust claims substantiation.
* Must have ability and flexibility to work in a global environment.
* Ability to collaborate, influence, manage routine processes, consider measured risks, and make decisions to drive project progress are critical components of the role.
* Must be able to work independently, think analytically, manage multiple complex tasks, while also being highly meticulous and organized.
* The ability to work in a matrix environment with cross\-functional teams and have excellent verbal and written communication skills is essential..

**What’s in it for you**

* Competitive Benefit Package
* Learning \& Development Opportunities
* Kenvuer Impact Networks


Kenvue is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment based on merit without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, national origin, or protected veteran status and will not be discriminated against on the basis of disability.


If you are an individual with a disability, please check our Disability Assistance page for information on how to request an accommodation.

title: Senior PV Manager
description:
### **Job Information**


* Industry Consulting
* Job Type Full time
* Work Experience 5\+ years
* Date Opened 08/04/2026
* City Roma
* Country Italy
### **About Us**


We are experts in the Life Sciences industry \& Technology.

  

We are a long\-standing partner for technology and expert service provider across Clinical, Regulatory, Quality, Pharmacovigilance and Medical Affairs domains.

  

We help companies to gain the best business value through technology\-enabled solutions and achieve excellence in business operations.

  


### **Job Description**


We are seeking a Senior PV Operations Manager – Post Marketing to provide strategic and operational leadership across post‑marketing pharmacovigilance services for multiple Life Sciences clients.

  

This role acts as a senior subject matter expert and client‑facing safety lead, supporting high‑quality service delivery, regulatory compliance, and inspection readiness, while mentoring PV teams and contributing to business growth.

### **Key Responsibilities:**

* Act as senior PV contact and safety lead for assigned client portfolios
* Provide oversight of post‑marketing safety surveillance and benefit–risk evaluation
* Ensure delivery of PV services in line with contracts, SLAs, and global PV regulations
* Lead or support signal detection, risk management, and RMP activities
* Oversee preparation and submission of PSURs / PBRERs and post‑marketing safety reports
* Support regulatory interactions, labeling updates, and health authority queries
* Lead and support PV audits, inspections, CAPAs, and system readiness activities
* Oversee vendors and partners delivering PV services
* Line manage, mentor, and provide technical leadership to PV teams
* Support proposals, bids, and service development activities

### **Required Profile:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences or a related scientific field
* 10\+ years of experience in Pharmacovigilance \& Drug Safety, with at least 5 years in a supervisory role
* Strong expertise in post‑marketing PV, EU GVP, MHRA, FDA, and ICH requirements
* Experience acting as client‑facing safety lead and managing complex PV portfolios
* Proven leadership, stakeholder management, and mentoring skills
* Strong organizational, analytical, and communication skills
* Fluent English

### **What We Offer:**

  

At Arithmos, you will play a key role in shaping post‑marketing pharmacovigilance strategies for global Life Sciences clients. We offer flexible working models, competitive compensation, and opportunities to grow internationally and to work on high‑impact safety programs in a collaborative, quality‑driven environment.

title: Drug Safety Manager
description:
### **Job Information**


* Industry Consulting
* Job Type Full time
* Date Opened 23/03/2026
* City Roma
* Country Italy
### **About Us**


We are experts in the Life Sciences industry \& Technology.

  

We are a long\-standing partner for technology and expert service provider across Clinical, Regulatory, Quality, Pharmacovigilance and Medical Affairs domains.

  

We help companies to gain the best business value through technology\-enabled solutions and achieve excellence in business operations.

  


### **Job Description**


We are seeking a Drug Safety Manager to support the delivery of high‑quality pharmacovigilance (PV) services for Life Sciences clients, ensuring full compliance with global PV regulations, client requirements, and Arithmos quality standards.

  

Working closely with Senior Drug Safety leadership, this role combines operational oversight, regulatory compliance, and scientific rigor within PV projects.

### **Key Responsibilities:**

* Support workflow development and delivery of Pharmacovigilance services
* Perform and oversee PV operational activities, including ICSRs, SUSARs, and literature screening
* Manage safety reporting in EudraVigilance (EVWEB) and XEVMPD (where trained and certified)
* Ensure preparation of PSURs, DSURs, and RMPs according to regulatory timelines
* Prepare and maintain Pharmacovigilance Agreements / SDEAs
* Provide oversight and quality control of day‑to‑day PV activities
* Support signal detection activities in collaboration with PV physicians
* Contribute to SOP development and review client procedures
* Support audit and inspection readiness and follow‑up of CAPAs
* Track compliance metrics and quality indicators

### **Required Profile:**

* University degree in a scientific discipline (e.g., Chemistry, Pharmacy, Biology, Biotechnology)
* 2\-3 years of experience in PV operations, including case processing, literature screening, or PVA activities
* Background as a Drug Safety Officer or similar PV role
* Experience in medical device safety reporting is a plus
* Strong knowledge of PV regulations and compliance requirements
* Fluent English
* Strong organizational, analytical, and teamwork skills
* Proactive, flexible, and detail‑oriented approach

### **What We Offer:**

  

At Arithmos, you will contribute to ensuring patient safety through high‑impact pharmacovigilance projects, working in a collaborative and quality‑driven environment. We offer professional and international growth opportunities, flexible working models, competitive compensation, and continuous development.

title: AA Clinical Specialist Manager - Italy, Greece, Cyprus and Malta Cluster
Manager, Technical Business Management
description:
**Work Schedule**


Standard (Mon\-Fri)**Environmental Conditions**


Office**Job Description**


As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every single day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our global teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while helping to take science a step beyond by developing solutions for some of the world’s toughest challenges, like protecting the environment, making sure our food is safe or helping find cures for cancer.  

  

DESCRIPTION:  

Join our collaborative team as a Business Management Manager at Thermo Fisher Scientific, where you'll contribute to customer success and business growth. You'll lead a team of Business Managers while serving as the primary liaison between our organization and key clients, ensuring exceptional service delivery and strong partnerships. This position offers the opportunity to develop strategic business relationships, optimize operational efficiency, and contribute directly to our mission of enabling customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer.  

  

REQUIREMENTS:  

* Advanced Degree plus 6 years of experience, or Bachelor's Degree plus 8 years of experience in pharmaceutical/chemical industry, preferably in CMO/CDMO environment
* Preferred Fields of Study: Science, Business Management, or related technical field
* Additional relevant technical certifications in pharmaceutical or project management disciplines valued
* People management experience leading cross\-functional teams
* Proficiency in contract negotiations and Master Supply Agreement (MSA) management
* Financial acumen for budgeting, forecasting, and pricing strategies
* Experience in client relationship management and strategic account development
* Project management capabilities with focus on technology transfer and commercial operations
* Demonstrated success in business development and revenue growth
* Analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Effective communication and presentation abilities
* Fluent in English; additional language skills may be considered
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and relevant ERP systems
* Knowledge of cGMP regulations and pharmaceutical industry standards
* Ability to travel up to 30% for client meetings and site visits
* Experience in managing multi\-million dollar client portfolios
* Change management and process improvement capabilities
company_description: At Thermo Fisher Scientific, our professionals develop critical solutions—and build rewarding careers.

title: Technical Supervisor – High-Level Solutions
description:
**Prima di candidarti per un lavoro, seleziona la lingua che preferisci tra le opzioni disponibili in alto a destra in questa pagina.**


Esplora la tua prossima opportunità in un'organizzazione Fortune Global 500\. Immagina possibilità innovative, sperimenta la nostra gratificante cultura e lavora con team di talento che ti aiutano a migliorare ogni giorno. Sappiamo cosa serve per guidare UPS verso il futuro: persone con una combinazione unica di competenze \+ passione. Se hai le qualità e la motivazione per guidare te stesso o i team, abbiamo a disposizione ruoli per permetterti di coltivare le tue competenze e permetterti di progredire.

**Descrizione impiego:**

 **Intro**


A Tech Rep Supervisor (Technical Representative, also referred to as Functional User Rep or Business System Engineer) represents operations towards IT, and IT towards the operations assuring operational requirements are supported by our UPS' IT systems while safeguarding operational requirements follow global IT standards.

* Do you like to play a key role in the Supply Chain of pharmaceutical products and medical devices, from manufacturing all the way to the patient?
* Do you want to be part of a new chapter within UPS Healthcare by rolling out our brand\-new, best in class Next Generation Supply Chain Software across Europe?
* Do endless rules and regulations for Pharma logistics and information security not scare you but challenge you design robust processes and solutions?
* Do you dislike manual key\-entry of data, swivel chair operations, excel based processes and unnecessary process steps just as much as we do?
* Do you have the skills to translate business requirements into IT requirements and work with our operations and IT department to design, build and implement logistic solutions?


If so UPS Healthcare Industrial Engineering is looking for you!

**What you'll do**

* As a Tech Rep Supervisor (also referred to as Functional User Rep or Business System Engineer ) you possess strong analytical and business process modelling skills. You analyze business requirements, translate it to the systematical process, test and support implementation of healthcare supply chain solutions into our Warehouse Management system.
* You will receive extensive training on these applications and be trained on healthcare process compliance. This will enable you to support implementation on our new System solution, identify and implement operational improvements, act as the 1st point of contact for operational IT questions.
* We expect a high level of autonomy in the projects you work on, in which you work closely together with our clients, Tech Reps for other UPS applications, Industrial Engineering, IT, QA, Operations and Project Management. You will be working for the UPS Healthcare global business unit. For more information on UPS Healthcare visit: ttps://www.ups.com/us/en/healthcare/Home.page

 **What you'll need**

* Education: Preferably a Bachelor in Business Administration, Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain Management, Information Technology or related engineering;
* Experience: At least 3\+ years in a role as industrial engineer, logistic specialist or consultant in a supply chain management environment. Experience in business requirements engineering, functional and user acceptance testing. Experience in Healthcare Logistics is a big plus.
* Competencies: strong knowledge of operational methods and procedures in a supply chain management environment and knowledge of SCM systems (OMS, WMS, TMS). You have the ability to determine and review various solutions and can translate these into business requirement documents.
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Be able and willing to travel
* Knowledge: excellent working knowledge of MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint. MS Visio experience is preferred as well. Excellent communication skills (English and Italian). SQL and MS Access knowledge preferred.

**What you'll get**

* Onboarding and ongoing training
* Professional growth (technical and business process knowledge)
* Plenty of opportunities to progress and grow thanks to our ‘promotion from within policy’.
* Participation to interesting and cross functional projects
* Exposure to innovation and initiatives
* International environment and career opportunities

**Location:** Passo Corese (Roma)

***Applications should be submitted in English***

 **Tipo di dipendente:**

  

A tempo indeterminato  

UPS si impegna a fornire un luogo di lavoro privo di discriminazioni, molestie e ritorsioni.

title: AI Video Editor / Motion Designer
description:
**CapsLock** specializes in providing digital marketing services to businesses facing sales growth challenges. Our services include sales consulting, data analytics, and recruitment support, ensuring efficient and accelerated growth. Founded by industry professionals in IT, design, and data analytics, we address the market need for exclusive, scalable customer acquisition solutions.


At **CapsLock**, we value people, client orientation, quality, continuous improvement, integrity, and strong relationships. Our diverse, global team speaks over 10 languages whose ideas inspire the innovation that runs through everything we do, from unique technology to industry\-leading services and customer experiences.

 **﻿Role overview**


The AI Video Editor / Motion Designer at CapsLock focuses on creating and editing high\-quality AI\-driven video content with the primary goal of improving conversion rates. This role sits at the intersection of creative storytelling, motion design, and AI tooling \- producing advertising videos that convert cold traffic across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and landing pages.


You will work closely with the Creative Director, marketers, and copywriters to develop, test, and iterate on video concepts, while leveraging cutting\-edge AI tools to accelerate production and push the quality bar \- especially around photorealistic human characters and lip\-sync accuracy.

 **Responsibilities**

**AI Video Creation \& Production**

* Create AI\-generated advertising videos for Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and landing pages \- converting cold traffic into warm leads
* Develop video ads from concept to final delivery, including funnel formats, YouTube, Facebook, and TikTok
* Produce and refine photorealistic human characters in video, ensuring maximum realism in motion, expression, and speech synchronization
* Enhance video quality through upscaling, smoothness improvements, and AI post\-processing
* Edit and enhance videos using dialogs, graphics, music, sound design, and visual effects — ensuring logical sequencing and strong storytelling
* Deliver polished final cuts optimized for advertising performance goals

 **Concept Development \& Pre\-Production**

* Craft clear storylines and narrative structures tailored to platform and audience
* Prepare shoot guides and gather reference materials when collaborating with videographers
* Research and propose multiple creative angles, selecting the best options based on data and research
* Implement new creative ideas and test different formats, calls\-to\-action, and visual approaches

 **AI Tools \& Optimization**

* Actively research, test, and integrate new AI tools into the production workflow to improve efficiency and output quality
* Experiment with AI\-powered editing techniques, including avatar generation, voice synthesis, and automated post\-production
* Use AI tools to streamline content creation and reduce production time without compromising quality

 **Analytics \& Performance**

* Analyze video performance metrics and use insights to continuously optimize creative content
* Run A/B tests on video formats, hooks, CTAs, and creative elements — monitor and document results promptly
* Gain deep product knowledge and apply it to data\-driven creative decisions

 **Collaboration \& Trend Integration**

* Work closely with Creative Director, copywriters, marketers, and designers to ensure creative alignment
* Track and apply the latest video trends, viral content formats, and platform\-specific features
* Document all tasks clearly in ClickUp per team standards
* Analyze market and audience data to inform creative decisions and identify areas for improvement

  

Requirements:  

  

**Must\-Have Skills**

* Experience creating AI\-generated video from scratch or based on references
* Ability to produce maximally realistic human characters / people in video (core project requirement)
* Strong skills in improving video quality: sharpness, smoothness, upscaling, and especially refining human realism in frame — including lip\-sync and speech\-to\-movement synchronization
* Perform full post\-production: cutting, titling, color correction, After Effects, sound mixing
* Collaborate with Creative Director on iterations and new creative concepts
* Deep enough understanding of video editing to speak the language and spot problems early
* Ability to work from a detailed brief (ТЗ) and proactively propose creative solutions

**Technical Skills**

* 1\+ year of experience in video editing, post\-production, or motion design
* Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, and other desktop\-based editing tools (mobile\-only editing not accepted)
* Hands\-on experience with AI video tools: Veo, Higgsfield, Runway, Kling, HeyGen, or similar
* Experience with AI image generation tools: Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, or similar
* Skilled in video rhythm, sound design, transitions, color correction, typography, and visual effects
* Solid understanding of video formats for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook
* Comfortable reviewing performance analytics and iterating based on data
* Upper\-intermediate English (B2\) or higher

**Soft Skills**

* Curious to explore new tools, formats, and creative approaches
* Adaptability to shifting priorities and fast\-paced team dynamics
* High execution speed without compromising quality
* Consistent on\-time delivery and strong attention to deadlines
* Strong attention to detail, especially when adhering to compliance and brand guidelines
* Critical thinking and a problem\-solving mindset
* Clear, professional communication and team collaboration skills
* Initiative to find solutions even when processes are undefined
* Strong work ethic, self\-motivation, and a drive to exceed expectations

 **Why do we deserve your attention?**


Not only do we offer fair and competitive pay, but we also provide perks and benefits that support your well\-being and growth. Here are some of them:

 **Remote Work**


We are a truly remote\-first company. You choose where you feel the most productive and comfortable to make an impact.

 **Paid Time Off**


Work\-life balance matters to us, and we support it with paid time off for rest, personal time, or simply doing what makes you happy.

 **Ongoing Learning**


We believe in curiosity and growth. That’s why we support continuous learning with workshops, online courses, conferences, and certifications.

 **Home Office**


We help you set up your perfect workspace by covering equipment and furniture expenses, so you can do your best work from home.

 **Physical Well\-Being**


From gym memberships and yoga classes to home workout equipment or even a bicycle, we give you the flexibility to stay active your way.

 **Unlimited Sick Days**


Your health matters. Take the time you need to rest and recover \- we’ll be here when you’re ready to return.

 **Medical Coverage**


We support you and your family with reimbursement for medical insurance and health\-related expenses, including dental care and psychological support.

 **Co\-Working Space**


If you sometimes crave a change of scenery or more social interaction, we’ll cover the full cost of a co\-working space.

 **Fun Stuff**


From gaming nights and fitness challenges to annual retreats at world\-class resorts, we make sure there’s never a shortage of fun and connection.

title: Regional Sales Lead Wound Closure&Biosurgery
description:
At Johnson \& Johnson, we believe health is everything. Our strength in healthcare innovation empowers us to build a world where complex diseases are prevented, treated, and cured, where treatments are smarter and less invasive, and solutions are personal. Through our expertise in Innovative Medicine and MedTech, we are uniquely positioned to innovate across the full spectrum of healthcare solutions today to deliver the breakthroughs of tomorrow, and profoundly impact health for humanity. Learn more at jnj.com.


As guided by Our Credo, Johnson \& Johnson is responsible to our employees who work with us throughout the world. We provide an inclusive work environment where each person is considered as an individual. At Johnson \& Johnson, we respect the diversity and dignity of our employees and recognize their merit.

**Job Function:**

MedTech Sales**Job Sub Function:**

Clinical Sales – Surgeons (Commission)**Job Category:**


People Leader**All Job Posting Locations:**


Pomezia, Roma, Italy**Job Description:**

**About Surgery**


Fueled by innovation at the intersection of biology and technology, we’re developing the next generation of smarter, less invasive, more personalized treatments.


Are you passionate about improving and expanding the possibilities of surgery? Ready to join a team that’s reimagining how we heal? Our Surgery team will give you the chance to deliver surgical technologies and solutions to surgeons and healthcare professionals around the world. Your contributions will help effectively treat some of the world’s most prevalent conditions such as obesity, cardiovascular disease and cancer. Patients are waiting.


Your unique talents will help patients on their journey to wellness. Learn more at https://www.jnj.com/medtech

**Purpose:** The Regional Sales Lead role is responsible for developing and managing the Surgery business across the Emilia Romagna, Veneto, Friuli, Trentino regions. The position includes leading a team composed of direct reports and agents, with the objective of achieving commercial targets, ensuring effective territorial coverage, and building strategic relationships with key stakeholders and opinion leaders in the sector.

**You will be responsible for:**

* Deliver annual sales targets, ensuring consistent business growth within the assigned Regions.
* Execute the action plan with strong strategic alignment to Franchise and Business Unit objectives.
* Reaches Commercial Excellence and Operational KPIs and targets
* Directly manages Area KOLS and Stakeholders, strengthening clinical and commercial relationships.
* Reaches Tender success targets by implementing successful value creation strategies and tactics
* Lead and manage a team of direct employees, trade agents, and distributors.
* Managing the entire J\&J WC \& BIO portfolio in the assigned Regions.
* Shape the future of the business area by driving innovation and strategic initiatives.
* Collaborate closely with Marketing to ensure excellence in execution and strong business results.
* Lead development of Area implementation plans, activities, and next steps required to close key opportunities
* Make data driven decisions to optimize performance and resource allocation within the region.

**Qualifications:**

* Master’s degree required; a background in Business, Marketing, or Engineering is preferred.
* Minimum 8 years of experience in the healthcare or medical device industry.
* Sales and Marketing experience within the medical device market strongly desired.
* General Surgery expertise is considered a plus.
* Home location: within the assigned territory, Emilia Romagna preferred
* Italian native speaker, with advanced proficiency in English (written and spoken).
* Proven track record of success in a matrixed organization, demonstrating enterprise minded decision making.
* Excellent understanding of customer needs, business intelligence, and industry trends.
* Demonstrated leadership in strategic planning and project management.
* Strong business and financial acumen, with the ability to interpret metrics and performance drivers.
* Excellent listening, written, and verbal communication skills, paired with strong organizational abilities and the capability to deliver high impact sales presentations.
* Strong stakeholder management skills, including the ability to communicate, influence, and provide comprehensive, customer focused solutions.
* Strong problem solving, organizational, and project management skills, with the ability to design, structure, and lead complex projects.

**Required Skills:**

General Surgery, Medical Devices, Sales Performance, Strategic Leadership**Preferred Skills:**


Business Development, Customer Centricity, Developing Others, Healthcare Trends, Inclusive Leadership, Interpersonal Influence, Leadership, Market Knowledge, Objectives and Key Results (OKRs), Presentation Design, Process Improvements, Revenue Management, Sales, Solutions Selling, Strategic Sales Planning, Sustainable Procurement, Technical Credibility, Vendor Selection
company_addresses: 1 Johnson And Johnson Plaza New Brunswick New Jersey, US  08933
company_description: Caring for the world, one person at a time... inspires and unites the people of Johnson & Johnson.
